title: Cake Slice Hunger Bar
description: Replaces all food bar sprites with cake slices
body:
**This resourcepack changes the icons from the hunger scale to pieces of cake.**

![Icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f2ae3a96b23fe4af642269895a75f61246417b3.png)

![AppleSkin Compat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f895b9638b564460b94e4095894600b6e5d9f3d8.png)

This resourcepack is compatible with Farmer's Delight and AppleSkin mods.
